creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
Created attachment 206853
Final patch

(In reply to Alexandros Perdikomatis from comment #25)

I have same error and this patch works for me!
Tested on FreeBSD 12.0 for virtualbox-ose-5.2.32_1.
May be commit in the ports tree?

root@vladiom:~ # uname -srm
FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p10 amd64
root@vladiom:~ # 
root@vladiom:~ # pkg version -v | grep virtualbox
virtualbox-ose-5.2.32_1            =   up-to-date with index
virtualbox-ose-kmod-5.2.32_1       =   up-to-date with index

P.S.
Thanks all!
